stemHtml: An aircraft is flying a magnetic heading of 120º and the RBI shows the NDB at a relative bearing of 270º. Which of the following statements is correct?

options.a: Turning into a magnetic heading of 030º, the magnetic bearing from the beacon will be 030º
options.b: The magnetic bearing from the beacon is 030º
options.c: The magnetic bearing to the beacon is 030º
options.d: Turning on to a magnetic heading of 030º, the magnetic bearing to the beacon will be 210º
